subject: Pansage, a small green simian Pokemon with a leafy head tuft, standing in a cheerful open-armed pose on a grassy field
description: A cheerful illustration of Pansage standing upright on a sunny meadow with arms spread wide in an open, welcoming pose. The small bipedal creature has a cream-colored body, large expressive eyes, and a prominent leafy green tuft sprouting from the top of its head. The background is a simple bright outdoor scene with saturated green grass underfoot and a blue sky with scattered white clouds. The mood is light, warm, and approachable, consistent with the flavor-text note about Pansage sharing its head-leaf to relieve stress in other Pokemon.
foreground: Pansage standing upright with arms spread, on grass
background: open grassy field under a blue sky with white clouds
